summary: Jehu is anointed to destroy the house of Ahab, killing Joram and Jezebel in fulfillment of Elijah's prophecies (ch. 9); he wipes out Ahab's remaining sons and tricks Baal's worshipers into a fatal assembly, though he never abandons the golden calves (ch. 10); and in Judah, Athaliah's massacre of the royal line is thwarted when young Joash is hidden six years before being crowned and Baal worship is purged (ch. 11).
